# Import IMDb ratings

Bring in ratings you already made so Rapid Rater skips repeats and gives you better picks.

> Security: Use disposable test accounts and non-personal sample data. Cover cookies, API keys, emails, names, and identifiers with solid opaque blocks before saving. Never blur a secret and never place an unredacted source image in the repository. Inspect the final image at full resolution and remove metadata before adding it.

## 1. Open IMDb exports

Sign in to IMDb and open its exports page.

[Open IMDb exports](https://www.imdb.com/exports/)

> **Screenshot needed:** IMDb exports page in desktop Chrome using a disposable account with ratings.
>
> **Solid-redact:** Account name, Account identifiers, Private list names

Last verified: Pending screenshot capture.

## 2. Download your ratings

Find Your ratings, choose Export, and wait for the CSV download to finish.

> **Screenshot needed:** IMDb exports page with the Your ratings row and its Export control clearly highlighted.
>
> **Solid-redact:** Account name, Export identifiers, Private list names

Last verified: Pending screenshot capture.

## 3. Choose the CSV

In Rapid Rater, choose Import IMDb CSV and select the ratings file you downloaded.

In Rapid Rater: **Choose IMDb CSV**

> **Screenshot needed:** Rapid Rater import area with Import IMDb CSV highlighted before the system file picker opens.
>
> **Solid-redact:** Signed-in email

Last verified: Pending screenshot capture.

## 4. You are ready

Rapid Rater removes imported titles from your queue and uses the history for stronger recommendations.

> **Screenshot needed:** Rapid Rater immediately after a successful IMDb CSV import, showing the movie and TV totals.
>
> **Solid-redact:** Signed-in email, Personally identifying rating history

Last verified: Pending screenshot capture.
